title: Confidence Calibration Buckets
summary: Makes confidence measurable via bucket-level reliability diagrams with hit rate, forward return, and MAE.

changes.description: Extended record_prediction_outcome() to accept forward_return_pct, mae_pct, regime. Stored in brier_scores.json history entries. Zero-pollution when defaults are 0/empty.

Added get_calibration_buckets() grouping 50-60/60-70/70-80/80-90/90+ bands. Per bucket: hit_rate, avg_forward_return_pct, avg_mae_pct, calibrated (good/fair/poor), regime breakdown. ECE computed at portfolio level.
GET /api/v7/self-learn/calibration/buckets. POST /calibration/record extended with forward_return_pct, mae_pct, regime query params.
Reliability Diagram table in Calibration card: bucket/n/hit%/fwd%/MAE%/calib. fetchCalibration() also fetches /calibration/buckets. calibBuckets added to Alpine selfLearn state.
Added --tb=short to pytest addopts. Added asyncio_mode=auto. Added comments explaining testpaths=['tests'] prevents scanning src/scripts/docs on every run.

18 tests covering: extended record signature, fwd/mae/regime storage, no-pollution on zero defaults, backward compat with old entries, bucket grouping, hit_rate, avg_fwd_return, avg_mae, empty bucket, calibrated good/poor, regime breakdown, ECE, total_records, REST endpoints.

title: Unified Sizing Advisor
summary: Single-call position sizing combining Kelly base x Thompson RL multiplier x staleness decay x portfolio heat gate.

changes.description: New SizingAdvisor + AdvisedSize dataclass. Pipeline: fixed-risk/half-Kelly base, Thompson Beta RL [0.25x-2.0x], exponential decay adj [0.5x-1.0x], heat throttle [0-1x], max_position_pct cap, max-risk hard cap. Full audit_trail per call.
New router in main.py. GET /api/v7/size/advise, POST /api/v7/size/advise/batch (max 20), GET /api/v7/size/params.
Suggested-size pill (1R base %) in ranked-signal meta row when entry+stop available. Inline Alpine arithmetic, no extra API call.
20 tests: fixed-risk arithmetic, half-Kelly, decay adj, heat throttle, score guard, zero-stop guard, position cap, risk cap, to_dict, REST endpoints.

title: Signal Confidence Decay Penalty
summary: Signals lose ranking score proportional to age via exponential half-life decay per setup grade.

changes.description: DECAY_SCHEDULE: A+=48h A=36h B+=24h B=18h C+=12h C=8h D=4h. apply_decay_penalty() uses 1-exp(-ln2/hl*age), cap at 20pts. get_stale_signals() filter+sort descending by age.
rank_batch() applies decay penalty to action_score + conviction_score (up to -10pts each). DEBUG log when decay_frac > 0.25.
Staleness badge in ranked-signal meta row: amber >4h, red >8h. Alpine x-if, zero cost for fresh signals.
14 tests: DECAY_SCHEDULE constants, penalty at 0h/half-life/2x, max cap, grade fallback, stale filter, sort, REST endpoints, ranker mock integration.
